title: Agentic-HTTP agent-meta envelope
description: Schema for the agent-meta object returned by Agentic-HTTP compliant endpoints

intent.description: Plain-language description of what this endpoint does, written for an agent reasoning about whether to call it

effect.description: Category of state change this endpoint produces

reversible.description: Whether the effects of this call can be undone via another API call

idempotent.description: Whether calling this endpoint multiple times with the same input produces the same result

retry-safe.description: Whether it is safe for the agent to automatically retry on transient failure

items.description: Lowercase hyphenated label describing an observable side effect

side-effects.description: Machine-readable list of observable side effects beyond the primary response

preconditions.description: Natural-language conditions that should be true before calling this endpoint

typical-next.description: Ordered list of endpoint paths typically called after this one

error-guidance.description: Map of HTTP status codes to agent-readable recovery instructions

extensions.description: Namespaced extension fields. Keys must be prefixed x-{namespace}-
